threats.title: T-001 Customer Account Spoofing
threats.description:
An attacker could impersonate a legitimate customer to place 
fraudulent orders or access their order history.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: T-002 Staff Account Spoofing
threats.description: An attacker could impersonate staff to manipulate order statuses,  access sales reports, or modify menu items and application configurations.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: T-003 Web Application Server Spoofing
threats.description:
An attacker might set up a fraudulent web server to phish user 
credentials or intercept sensitive data.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: T-004 Order Data Tampering
threats.description: An attacker could modify order details (e.g., items, quantities, prices, status) in transit or at rest.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: T-008 Fraudulent Order Repudiation
threats.description: A customer could deny placing an order if insufficient logging and nonrepudiation controls are in place.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: T-010 Customer PII Disclosure
threats.description:
Unauthorized access to customer names, contact details, delivery 
addresses, and order history
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: T-014 Web Application Server DoS
threats.description:
An attacker could flood the Web Application Server with excessive 
requests, making it unavailable.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: T-016 Customer to Staff Privilege Escalation
threats.description:
A customer could exploit a vulnerability to gain unauthorized access to 
Barista, Manager, or Administrator functionalities.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: T-018 Horizontal Privilege Escalation
threats.description:
Gaining unauthorized access to another user’s account within the same 
privilege level.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: T-009 Staff Action Repudiation
threats.description:
Staff members (Barista, Manager, Administrator) could deny performing 
actions if audit logs are insufficient, not immutable, or can be tampered 
with.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: T-011 Staff Credential Disclosure
threats.description:
Exposure of usernames, passwords, or session tokens for staff members 
due to insecure storage or unencrypted transmission.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: T-014 Web Application Server DoS
threats.description:
An attacker could flood the Web Application Server with excessive 
requests, making it unavailable.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: T-015 MongoDB Database DoS
threats.description:
Malicious or poorly optimized queries could overload the database, 
making it unresponsive.
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A
